reviews.comment:
Nada fuera de lo normal. Te atienden bien pero son muy lentos. No te detengas ahí si vas apurado

(Translated by Google)
Nothing out of the ordinary. They serve you well, but they're very slow. Don't stop there if you're in a hurry.

reviews.comment:
Una estación de servicio muy bien ubicada ya que zapala es un centro de repartición turística... aparte esta muy bien cuidada y cuenta con un hermoso shop para descansar y tomar algo antes de emprender un viaje hacia la cordillera y también de regreso a casa!

(Translated by Google)
A very well-located service station since Zapala is a tourist distribution center... besides, it is very well maintained and has a lovely shop to rest and have something to eat before embarking on a trip to the mountains and also on the way back home!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/4946581049957260491/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNzbUwyd25RRRAB

reviews.comment:
Medio pelo. Son incapaces de poner un refuerzo para atender en época de vacaciones, lo que genera colas para cargar combustible y para comprar en el shop.
La máquina de aire para los neumáticos anda mal.

(Translated by Google)
Mediocre. They're incapable of providing extra staff during holiday periods, which creates long lines for fuel and shopping at the convenience store. The tire inflation machine is malfunctioning.
